objective: Fix image API errors, add SQLite-based vendor profile storage with cross-run dedup.
non_goals: No automated scheduling or background publishing
No separate vendor discovery/scanning — CSV remains the input source

completed: Image filtering fix: getImageDimensions() with proper JPEG+PNG header parsing replaces fragile SOF0 byte-scan.
validateImageForVlm() guards added in runOcr() and runVlmParse() — rejects images < 16px before any API call.
SQLite module created at lib/competitor-ad-sqlite.ts with records + vendor_profiles tables (WAL mode).
author_name promoted to top-level CompetitorAdRecord field (from parsed.vendor HTML extraction).
buildRecordBase() and buildRecordFromDeterministic() updated to pass author_name.
loadExistingRecords() removed — replaced with SQLite isRecordKnown() for cross-run dedup.
--show-vendors CLI flag added (standalone read-only, no CSV needed).
DB stats printed in run summary (db_total_records, db_distinct_vendors).
gaps: No unit tests written for lib/competitor-ad-sqlite.ts yet.
No schema migration system — only CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS.
author_name is undefined in OCR/VLM fallback path (HTML parse failed). This is expected but means those records won't have author_name in DB.
DB file location is artifacts/competitor-ads/competitor-ads.db — if artifact dirs are cleaned, DB is lost.

acceptance_criteria_met: CLI run outputs artifacts/competitor-ads/<run_id>/data/records.jsonl.gz and run-summary.json — YES
Cross-run dedup works — re-running same CSV skips all rows — YES
Image API error (400 tiny image) prevented — YES (pre-API dimension guard)
DB file exists at artifacts/competitor-ads/competitor-ads.db with 2 records, 2 vendors — YES
decisions: better-sqlite3 (sync API) chosen over async sqlite3 for simplicity.
DB is shared across runs at artifacts/competitor-ads/competitor-ads.db, not per-run.
Products stored as JSON arrays in SQLite (not normalized to separate tables).
CSV remains the sole vendor input source; no auto-discovery of posters.
JSONL output kept for backward compatibility; DB is the canonical source for cross-run queries.
constraints: Manual execution only; no automated scheduler for competitor intel.
Do not log secrets or credentials.
Publisher/observer systems must remain fail-closed for missing evidence.

key_code_changes.getImageDimensions: Proper JPEG (0xFFD8 + SOF markers) and PNG (IHDR chunk) dimension decoding.
key_code_changes.validateImageForVlm: Pre-API guard: rejects images < 16px in either dimension.
key_code_changes.runOcr/runVlmParse: Both now call validateImageForVlm before callOllamaGenerate().
key_code_changes.main(): SQLite open/close, --show-vendors flag, isRecordKnown dedup, insertRecord + upsertVendorProfile per record.

next_actions: Consider adding unit tests for lib/competitor-ad-sqlite.ts.
If vendor discovery is needed later, consider adding a --scan-board flag to enumerate posters.
If DB becomes large, consider adding a schema migration system.
practical_recommendations: Re-running same CSV will skip already-processed records (cross-run dedup via SQLite).
